data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'Custom report builder' as part of the reporting capabilities. However, the evidence does not include any specific details or functionality related to a custom report builder, which is explicitly listed as a need in the linked use case. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as there is no confirmation that this feature exists or is operational.
gaps: No evidence of a custom report builder functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
